acceptance_criteria: docs/compat.md mastodon.social row all checkmarks; 3+ other implementations all checkmarks; all 5 target clients (Ivory, Phanpy, Elk, Tusky, Tuba) pass login/timeline/post/media/reply/notifications/streaming; rate limit headers present; error responses are {"error": "..."} JSON
description: Test and fix compatibility against real live fediverse instances and real clients. This is not optional — it is the release gate. The compat matrix in docs/compat.md must show a complete green row for mastodon.social and at least 3 other implementations before tagging v0.1.0. Bugs found here are often protocol-level edge cases not visible in unit tests.
design: Test harness: Docker Compose with local Mastodon instance + Phanpy pointed at smallhold. Run harness on every commit touching client API surface. Canary against mastodon.social.social for federation. smallhold compat-test --target=mastodon.social --persona=writer for automated probes. Fix bugs by matching mastodon.social behavior, not spec docs.
title: Phase 9: Compatibility Hardening
